prose: **Pyridine HOMO–LUMO Gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, no density fitting) via PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file, single-point (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 10 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398 eV** (frontier orbital energy difference via Koopmans approximation, not an electronic excitation energy). HOMO energy = −7.2526 eV, LUMO energy = −1.1128 eV. Total electronic energy = −6758.72 eV. Molecule: pyridine (C₅N H₅, 11 atoms, 216 basis functions at def2-TZVP). Integrity trustworthy, no warnings. Reproducibility: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`
